blog_title: Top 5 International Destinations You Should Visit in November
seo_title: Top 5 International Destinations You Should Visit in November
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jul 02 2025

November is a season with pleasant weather and many exciting seasonal events, organized in many regions around the world. The best travel company in Kolkata can make your trips seamless all the way. Know about the top 5 destinations you should visit in November for unforgettable moments.

Thailand

In November, Thailand wears a festive look during Loy Krathong, also known as the “Festival of Lights,” is celebrated by floating decorated baskets, or krathongs, on rivers to pay respect to the water goddess. The best international travel agency in Kolkata can easily arrange a trip to Thailand for you, to witness this mesmerizing event.

Celebrated primarily in Chiang Mai, the Yi Peng Lantern Festival witnesses the release of thousands of sky lanterns into the air. This visually stunning festival draws travelers from worldwide.

Dubai

The pleasant November weather in Dubai is perfect for outdoor activities and events. You can participate in the November Fitness Fest, an annual celebration that promotes health and wellness through events such as marathons, yoga classes, and fitness challenges.

You can also enjoy other attractions, such as the Desert Safari, at this time. With a top 10 best travel company in Kolkata, you can enjoy the luxurious offerings of this city.

Hong Kong

Hong Kong transforms into a culinary paradise in November with the Great November Feast, a month-long celebration of food and drink. From fine dining experiences to street food festivals, this event is a food lover’s dream. You can sample signature dishes from local and international chefs, as well as taste fine wine and beer.

You can also catch some of the world’s best golfers in action at the Hong Kong Open, Asia’s premier golf tournament, held in November.

Mauritius

Be in for a cultural treat at Mauritius in November, a time for the unique Thimithi Festival, a fire-walking ceremony held at temples around the island. You can watch devotees walking barefoot over hot embers at this Tamil religious event.

The International Kréol Festival is another highlight, filled with rhythmic beats, colorful costumes, and delectable Creole cuisine, making it a must-see event for any traveler.

Vietnam

Do you love thrills? Catch the Do Son Buffalo Fighting Festival in Hai Phong, a thrilling event featuring buffalo combat, a traditional celebration symbolizing strength and courage. Or if you love serenity, witness the Buckwheat Flower Festival in Ha Giang that celebrates the beautiful blooming of buckwheat flowers, filling the fields with vibrant purple-pink hues.

For an enriching and memorable experience in November, do not miss visiting these destinations. You will love to immerse yourself in these festivals with Kolkata travel agency tour packages.
